source.pdf_inspection: The canonical PDF path was not mounted and no repository PDF copy was available. The extracted section includes the complete MSK 909 page text.

intentional_skips: No image-front diagnosis cards were created because the section contains anatomy schematics rather than a diagnostic case.
No full-page screenshot was packaged because the source PDF was unavailable in the mounted environment.
Basic labels for epiphysis, physis, metaphysis, diaphysis, synovial fluid, and articular cartilage were skipped as low-yield filler.
Shared osteocyte, lacuna, canaliculus, lamellar, and cement-line details were skipped because the extracted table formatting was ambiguous and the distinctions were less board-relevant.
